LAW AND MOTION 302, ETITIONER CAREPENTERS 46 NORTHERN'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD. PETITIONERS CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES CONFERENCE BOARD'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD OF AUGUST 10, 2018 IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PURSUANT TO PARAGRAPH 5 OF THE AWARD, THE COURT GRANTS PETITIONERS' MOTION FOR AN AWARD OF REASONABLE ATTORNEYS' FEES AND COSTS IN THE TOTAL AMOUNT OF $2,778.75. ORDER AND JUDGMENT ARE SIGNED. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. =(302/EPS)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Mar-18-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Ryan B. Kadevari, esq. (510-337-1001) of Weinberg Roger & Rosenfeld for Plaintiff.
No other appearances.

Not argued, counsel presents proposed order and proposed judgment. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER CAREPENTERS 46 NORTHERN's Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award.

Petitioners Carpenters 46 Northern California Counties Conference Board's petition to confirm arbitration award of August 10, 2018 is granted. No opposition filed. Pursuant to Paragraph 5 of the Award, the Court grants petitioners' motion for an award of reasonable attorneys' fees and costs in the total amount of $2,778.75.

Order and Judgment are signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
